title: Just Copper Totem
description: Just a copper totem of undying!🙃
body:
## This resource pack makes your totem copper!

Perfect for you if you love copper blocks and steampunk! The texture continues to retain its vanilla style. Pairs perfectly with a [copper hotbar and hearts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copperhud).

![activation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aoRtF4k8/images/72fefb77b71b1b4b8c6989c66de0b811ba26fe36.png)
